discounted-happy-hour.question: Does Coco Maya have a happy hour?
discounted-happy-hour.answer: Coco Maya doesn't currently run a discounted happy hour. The full cocktail program and the elevated rooftop patio are open and available every day, no special time window required.

best-time.question: What are the best times to visit the rooftop patio?
best-time.answer: The patio is open daily and works well any time, though late afternoon into early evening tends to have the best light for the glass atrium bar and skyline views.

patio-reservation.question: Do I need a reservation to sit on the patio?
patio-reservation.answer: Reservations are recommended, especially on weekends, but walk-ins are welcome on the patio based on availability.
